name: Vanilla Forums
description: Vanilla Forums — Community forum platform with gamification, SSO, and Q&A format for branded communities.

seo.title: Vanilla Forums — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Vanilla Forums: Vanilla Forums — Community forum platform with gamification, SSO, and Q&A format for branded communities.

when_to_use: Branded Q&A community with gamification for a SaaS product
Customer support forum reducing tickets via community answers
SSO-connected community forum integrated with a product login
Knowledge base community with upvoted answers and search
Developer forum for a platform with API and plugin support

pros: Gamification and Q&A format built in
Long track record with brand communities
cons: UX looks dated next to modern tools
review.verdict: A capable enterprise forum with classic features, overshadowed by newer community-first platforms.
review.best_for: Established brands wanting structured Q&A forums with SSO and gamification.
review.not_for: Modern SaaS or creator communities prioritizing sleek UX and quick setup.
